visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair tied in a neat bun, wearing a white open-knit crochet sweater and light-colored shorts, sits cross-legged on a tan tatami-style floor. She is intently reading a small book held in both hands. To her left sits a small white and blue table fan, and in front of her lie black over-ear headphones. The setting is a minimalist, brightly lit room with sunlight filtering through horizontal window blinds, creating a warm, airy atmosphere. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the woman. She looks up from her book directly into the lens, smiling with a pleasant, expectant expression while still holding the open book. (3) She closes the book and places it on her lap. She begins clapping her hands rhythmically with a joyful, excited expression. Multiple layers of yellow text overlays appear vertically across the frame, followed by animated yellow hand-clapping emojis. (4) A digital red curtain graphic with a white vertical stripe closes over the scene, featuring bold white text in the center. (5) The curtain opens to reveal the woman laughing and cheering with her arms slightly raised. Colorful digital confetti falls around her as the scene maintains its bright, high-key lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 有件大事要跟大家分享. (2) [Subtitle]: 年假最後一天喔！. (3) [Variety]: 👏👏👏👏. (4) [Slogan]: 上班！.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in a domestic setting.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair in a high bun, wearing a white crochet-knit long-sleeve sweater and light shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist indoor room with light wood furniture, a tatami floor mat, and large windows with white horizontal blinds allowing bright sunlight to enter.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-tempo, upbeat pop music featuring a heavy electronic beat and bright synthesizers. A female voice speaks with high energy and a fast speech rate, sounding very excited. (2) Rhythmic, percussive hand-clapping sounds are introduced, perfectly synchronized with the musical beat. The vocal energy remains consistently high. (3) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a transition, followed by the female voice shouting a word emphatically with a rising pitch contour. (4) The music continues at its peak energy as stylized 'pop' sound effects and digital chime layers are added to the mix, emphasizing the celebratory tone.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous narrative to share the relatable experience of the last day of the Lunar New Year holiday. It begins with a calm, intellectual visual of reading, then shifts to a high-energy reveal of 'going back to work,' using contrast and upbeat audio to create a comedic effect.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social-media style short video characterized by high visual contrast between the 'calm' start and 'chaotic/joyful' end.
